name: DoIP_SendPowerModeInformationRequest
title: DoIP_SendPowerModeInformationRequest
description: Sends power mode information request as limited broadcast or to the given address.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Address to send to, i.e. not a limited broadcast. May be a directed broadcast address.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
